titleStmt.title: SII 9.643: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 643. (A.R. No. 32 of 1917.) ON A SLAB SET UP AT DODDAKATTA-CHERUVU NEAR HALUKUR, MADAKASIRA TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1473, Virōdhikṛit, Śrāvaṇa, śu. 1 corresponding to A.D. 1551 July 4, Saturday (not verifiable), in the reign of Sadāśivadēva-Mahārāya. It records that, under the orders of the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāja-Viṭhalayadēva-Mahāarasu, the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Tirumalayadēva-Mahā-arasu of Manubōlu made a kaṭṭu-koḍagi gift of land to Māḷi-Gauḍa and Parusa-Gauḍa for repairing the tank at Doḍḍagaṭṭa in Niḍugal-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrījayādbhuda
yaśālivāhanaśakavaruśaṁgaḷu 1
473 neya virōdhikrutusaṁvatsarada śrā
vaṇa śu 1 lu śrīmanmahārājādhirā
ja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa
śrīsadāśivadēvamahārāyaru pruthu
vīrājyaṁ gyayivutaṁ yiralu śrīma
n(ṁ)mahāmaṁḍalēśvara rāmarā
ja viṭhalayadēvamahāarasugaḷa ni
rupadiṁda śrīma(ṁ)nṛmahāmaṁḍa
lēśvara Apratikamalla manubōli tiruma
layadēvamahāarasugaḷu tamage Amarake
pālisida niḍugala nāḍoḷagaṇa doḍagaṭa
da gauuḍagaḷiya viravvaṣadēśake gauu
ḍana maga māḷigauḍa dēvagauḍana maga paru
sagauḍagaḷige koṭa kaṭugoḍagiya śāsanada kra
maveṁteṁdare naṁma doḍagaṭada keṟe voḍadu
khilavāgi yiralāgi nīu A keṟeya vaṁ
du vaḍakiyanu kaṭidakke nimage koṭa kaṭu
goḍagi gade modala kaṭeya staḷadalu gade
ba . 0 Ayiguḷa Akṣaradalu Ayiguḷa gade yī
Ayiguḷa gadeyanu niṁma putrapautrapāraṁpareyavāgi
Āceṁdrarkastayigaḷāgi AnubhavisuUdu yi kaṭugoḍa
gige Āru tapidaru taṁma teṁdeyalu hattutāyalu hanno
ṁdu yipatūṁdu mātāpitrugaḷa vāraṇāsiyalu koṁ
da dōśake hōharū sāvira gōu sāvira brāṁ
hara koṁda dōśake hōharū Aṁdu koṭa kaṭugo
ḍagiya mānyada dharmaśāśana yi mānyava koṭa
tiṁmarājana vapita śrīmarakapurada ceṁnarāya .
Digital edition of SII 9.643 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
